assembly_context.name: 4Axis_Robotic_Arm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 生成一个包含底座、3个中间臂段和1个带夹爪顶臂的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体加圆台接口；臂段由两端方块（60x60x60mm）和中间圆柱组成，通过侧面销孔配合实现竖直转动；底座与第一臂通过中心轴孔配合实现水平转动。所有方块棱边倒角C2。交付SolidWorks零件及装配文件。
design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling API.
Chamfer C2 on all cube edges of arm segments.
Clearance fit assumed for pin/hole interfaces (nominal size used for geometry).
Gripper fingers are modeled in half-open state.
assembly_sequence: Insert base_plate and fix to GROUND.
Mate arm_segment_2.bottom_side_face coincident with arm_segment_1.top_pin_face (or appropriate offset).

part.name: Arm Segment 2
part.function: Second moving link, rotates vertically around Arm 1 pin.
part.shape: Identical to Arm Segment 1 structure: Two 60x60x60mm cubes, Φ40x150mm cylinder. Bottom cube has side Φ10 through-hole. Top cube has side Φ10x15mm pin. All cube edges chamfered C2.

faces.name: bottom_side_face
faces.purpose: Mates with Arm 1 top pin face

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local X, offset in bottom cube

axes.name: pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local X, offset in top cube

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole concentric with Arm 1 pin_axis.
Bottom side face coincident/offset with Arm 1 top_pin_face.
Pin axis will mate with Arm 3 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Instead of central bottom hole, create side through-hole Dia 10 in bottom cube.
Ensure hole axis is parallel to the pin axis direction.
Add top pin Dia 10x15 on opposite or same side depending on design (assume consistent orientation for simplicity, e.g., both on +X relative to local frame, but assembly rotates them).
